html:
Exclusive to:

“Toggles Wolfgang's coaching skill on and off.”

-

The Coaching Whistle is a Character-specific craftable Item exclusive to Wolfgang in Don't Starve Together. Once Wolfgang has unlocked the Coach Wolfgang Skill in his Skill Tree, the Whistle can be crafted by Wolfgang in his Survivor Items Filter, requiring 1 Flint and 1 Rope. The Whistle only has an effect when used by Wolfgang in his Normal form. While active, it will motivate nearby players and followers (including other players' followers) every 10-40 seconds within six Pitchfork tiles. Players will receive a sanity gain of 5 and followers will receive a 9.5 second double damage buff.

Wolfgang will continue coaching even after dropping the whistle; however, reverting to Wimpy or Mighty form will cancel the coaching. This means it is difficult to fight alongside your followers, as attacking will increase your mightiness until the effect is eventually cancelled when Wolfgang becomes Mighty. Without any manipulation, followers' double damage buff will be active only roughly one third of the time, due to the average time it takes for Wolfgang to trigger his motivation while coaching.

Here is a list of creatures that can be affected by the Whistle:

  • Tamed Pig
  • Tamed Merms
  • Tamed Rock Lobster
  • Tamed Spider
  • Tamed Spider Warrior
  • Tamed Dangling Depth Dweller
  • Tamed Cave Spider
  • Tamed Spitter
  • Tamed Nurse Spider
  • Tamed Sea Strider
  • Tamed Shattered Spider
  • Abigail
  • Shadow Duelist
  • Grumble Bee spawned by Apicultural Notes

Tips

  • If Wolfgang stops coaching a few seconds after the motivation triggers and immediately starts coaching again, he will only have a 7 second cooldown to motivate again. Effectively, Wolfgang's coaching can have close to 100% uptime if managed correctly. However, if done too early, he will have the random 10-40 second cooldown to motivate after starting to coach.

Trivia

  • The Coaching Whistle was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"Let out your inner coach!"
Object Info
Perk
Gives sanity to nearby players and doubles the damage of nearby followers.
Infinite (Playing)

Exclusive to:
“It gives me terrible flashbacks to the gym classes of my youth...”
–Wilson
“I can't NOT listen to him when he's holding a shiny whistle!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is good teacher!”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail, I saw you whispering at Wolfgang to make us do pushups!”
–Wendy
“UGH! THE WHISTLE INCREASES HIS AUTHORITY!”
–WX-78
“Please try to keep the noise to a minimum, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“He'd better not ask me to start doing jumping jacks...”
–Woodie
“Ah yes. What could be more motivating than the shriek of a whistle?”
–Maxwell
“My ally will get öur förces fighting fit!”
–Wigfrid
“Mr. Wolfgang likes to play with whistles, just like us!”
–Webber
“I think my friend is enjoying this taste of leadership.”
–Warly
“Muscle man's tweet-maker”
–Wormwood
“Whatcha need, coach?”
–Winona
“Who knew a whistle held such sway, it makes folks listen to what you say!”
–Wortox
“Shiny... maybe he not mind if me borrow...”
–Wurt
“We're ready, coach! Right, Woby?”
–Walter
“There's a time and a place for exercise, I suppose.”
–Wanda
“Toggles Wolfgang's coaching skill on and off.”
-

Without any manipulation, followers' double damage buff will be active only roughly one third of the time, due to the average time it takes for Wolfgang to trigger his motivation while coaching.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Còi huấn luyện là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo dành riêng cho từng nhân vật dành riêng cho Wolfgang trong Don't Starve Together. Sau khi Wolfgang đã mở khóa Kỹ năng Huấn luyện viên Wolfgang trong Cây Kỹ năng của mình, Wolfgang có thể chế tạo Còi trong Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót của mình, yêu cầu 1 Đá lửa và 1 Dây thừng. Còi chỉ có tác dụng khi được Wolfgang sử dụng ở dạng Thường. Khi hoạt động, nó sẽ thúc đẩy những người chơi và người theo dõi ở gần (bao gồm cả những người theo dõi của người chơi khác) cứ sau 10-40 giây trong sáu ô Pitchfork. Người chơi sẽ nhận được mức tăng tinh thần là 5 và những người theo dõi sẽ nhận được sức mạnh sát thương gấp đôi trong 9,5 giây.

The '''Coaching Whistle''' is a [[Character]]-specific craftable [[Item]] exclusive to [[Wolfgang]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. Once Wolfgang has unlocked the [[Wolfgang/Don't Starve Together#Coach Wolfgang|Coach Wolfgang]] Skill in his Skill Tree, the Whistle can be crafted by Wolfgang in his Survivor Items Filter, requiring 1 [[Flint]] and 1 [[Rope]]. The Whistle only has an effect when used by Wolfgang in his Normal form. While active, it will motivate nearby players and followers (including other players' followers) every 10-40 seconds within six Pitchfork tiles. Players will receive a sanity gain of 5 and followers will receive a 9.5 second double damage buff.

Wolfgang will continue coaching even after dropping the whistle; however, reverting to Wimpy or Mighty form will cancel the coaching. This means it is difficult to fight alongside your followers, as attacking will increase your mightiness until the effect is eventually cancelled when Wolfgang becomes Mighty. Without any manipulation, followers' double damage buff will be active only roughly one third of the time, due to the average time it takes for Wolfgang to trigger his motivation while coaching.

Here is a list of creatures that can be affected by the Whistle:

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
*If Wolfgang stops coaching a few seconds after the motivation triggers and immediately starts coaching again, he will only have a 7 second cooldown to motivate again. Effectively, Wolfgang's coaching can have close to 100% uptime if managed correctly. However, if done too early, he will have the random 10-40 second cooldown to motivate after starting to coach.
